Class MulticoreMolecularDynamicsProvider

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.technical.algorithm.physics.MulticoreMolecularDynamicsProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
AlgorithmProvider, MolecularDynamicsProvider
@AutoService(AlgorithmProvider.class) public class MulticoreMolecularDynamicsProvider extends Object implements MolecularDynamicsProvider
Multicore implementation of MolecularDynamicsProvider.
Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    calculateBondForces(double[] positions, double[] forces, int[] bondIndices, double[] bondLengths, double[] bondConstants)
    Computes harmonic bond forces between atoms using double precision.
    void
    calculateBondForces(Real[] positions, Real[] forces, int[] bondIndices, Real[] bondLengths, Real[] bondConstants)
    Computes harmonic bond forces between atoms using Real precision.
    void
    calculateNonBondedForces(double[] positions, double[] forces, double epsilon, double sigma, double cutoff)
    Computes Lennard-Jones forces between atoms using double precision.
    void
    calculateNonBondedForces(Real[] positions, Real[] forces, Real epsilon, Real sigma, Real cutoff)
    Computes Lennard-Jones forces between atoms using Real precision.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the human-readable name of the provider.
    int
    getPriority()
    Returns the execution priority (higher is better).
    void
    integrate(double[] positions, double[] velocities, double[] forces, double[] masses, double dt, double damping)
    Updates particle positions and velocities using double precision.
    void
    integrate(Real[] positions, Real[] velocities, Real[] forces, Real[] masses, Real dt, Real damping)
    Updates particle positions and velocities using Real precision.
